title: FloraLexicon Tier 1 Plant Entry
description: A Tier 1 plant is globally commercially significant. Every country in supported_countries MUST have at least one name entry in names. The first name in each country's array is the implicit primary. No propagation, no synthesis, no inferred fields.

plant_id.description: Must match a plant_id from canonical/plants.json.

supported_countries.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country codes. Every entry MUST have a corresponding key in names.

additionalProperties.description: The first entry is the implicit primary. Additional entries are alternatives ordered by frequency/authority.

notes.description: Optional editorial notes. Not displayed to users.

CountryCode.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2, uppercase. Must exist in canonical/countries.json.

LanguageCode.description: BCP 47 language tag. Base language only (es, fr) or with region (pt-BR, zh-CN).

Source.description: Controlled vocabulary. Normalise upstream source strings to these values at ingestion. Free-text attribution goes in 'citation'. Use 'pharmacopoeia_traditional' for officially-codified traditional medicine systems (Chinese Pharmacopoeia, Ayurvedic Pharmacopoeia of India, Korean Pharmacopoeia of Traditional Medicine).

name.description: The local name as written in the target country. Preserve original script (Cyrillic, Arabic, Han, etc.).

citation.description: Optional free-text citation. E.g. 'WHO Monograph Vol. 1 p. 87' or 'INVIMA 2021-03'.

transliteration.description: Latin-script transliteration. REQUIRED when 'name' contains non-Latin script characters; FORBIDDEN otherwise (validator-enforced). Used for search indexing, not display.

transliteration_scheme.description: Romanisation scheme used for the transliteration. REQUIRED when 'transliteration' is present; FORBIDDEN otherwise (validator-enforced). ala_lc covers both Arabic and Hebrew (Library of Congress romanisation). iso_843 for Greek. rtgs (Royal Thai General System) for Thai. See STYLE_GUIDE.md for project defaults per script.

_changelog: v1.1 (2026-04-23): added pharmacopoeia_traditional to Source enum; added transliteration_scheme enum field
v1.2 (2026-04-23): added iso_843 (Greek) and rtgs (Thai) to transliteration_scheme enum; documented ala_lc covers Hebrew
